# Proxy Tech Support

> Proxy Tech Support provides real-time IT job support and proxy interview assistance for software developers and engineers across USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Europe, Germany, Ireland, Singapore, and worldwide. Senior in-house experts join your working hours via screen share and deliver hands-on help with coding, debugging, architecture, and task delivery — as well as live guidance during technical interviews. Same-day start. 1000+ professionals helped. All major time zones covered.

## Core Service Pages

- [Agentic AI & Machine Learning Job Support](/agentic-ai-ml-job-support/): Real-time expert support for AI/ML engineers — LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents SDK, GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Llama 4 Maverick/Scout, RAG architectures (GraphRAG, Self-RAG, CRAG, HyDE), PyTorch 2.5, Hugging Face, LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning, vLLM, MLflow, SageMaker, Vertex AI, Bedrock, Langfuse, RAGAS.
- [AI Workflow Automation & Pipeline Engineering Job Support](/ai-workflow-automation-pipeline-job-support/): Expert DevOps AI pipeline support — Airflow 2.10, Prefect 3.x, Dagster 1.x, Temporal.io, Dagger.io, GitHub Actions AI, ArgoCD 2.12, Flux CD 2.x, Kubeflow Pipelines 2.x, ZenML, SageMaker Pipelines, Vertex AI Pipelines, Kubernetes 1.32, KEDA, Karpenter, Datadog Bits AI, Dynatrace Davis, Grafana 11, Terraform, OpenTofu, Pulumi, LLMOps.
- [Data Science Job Support](/data-science-job-support/): Support for data scientists — pandas 2.2, Polars 1.x, scikit-learn 1.5, XGBoost 2.1, LightGBM, SHAP, PySpark 3.5, Databricks 15.x, Prophet, statsforecast, DoWhy, EconML, spaCy, BERTopic, dbt 1.8, Airflow, Prefect, Tableau, Power BI.
- [DevOps & Automation Job Support](/devops-job-support/): Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, GitLab CI, Kafka, Prometheus, Grafana, Infrastructure as Code.
- [SRE & Reliability Engineering Job Support USA](/sre-job-support-usa/): Real-time SRE expert help — SLO/SLI implementation, error budget tracking, multi-window burn-rate alerting, incident response, blameless postmortems, Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, PagerDuty, OpsGenie, chaos engineering (Gremlin, LitmusChaos, Chaos Monkey), toil automation, capacity planning, multi-region failover, distributed tracing.
- [Cloud Technologies Job Support](/cloud-technologies-job-support/): AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform, serverless (Lambda, Azure Functions), cloud architecture and migration.
- [AWS Job Support](/aws-job-support/): EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, EKS, ECS, SageMaker, Bedrock, CloudFormation, CDK, IAM, VPC.
- [Python Job Support](/python-job-support/): Python 3.12+, FastAPI, Django, Flask, pandas, NumPy, async Python, testing frameworks.
- [Front-End / Full-Stack Development Job Support](/frontend-fullstack-job-support/): React.js, Angular, Vue.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, GraphQL, REST APIs.
- [React Job Support](/react-job-support/): React 18+, hooks, state management, performance, testing, Next.js.
- [Backend & Enterprise Job Support](/backend-enterprise-job-support/): ASP.NET Core, Node.js, NestJS, Express.js, microservices, gRPC, message queues.
- [Node.js Job Support](/node-job-support/): Node.js, Express, NestJS, REST/GraphQL APIs, streaming, WebSockets.
- [.NET Job Support](/dotnet-job-support/): ASP.NET Core, C#, Blazor, Entity Framework, MVC, WPF, MAUI.
- [Java Technology Stack Job Support](/java-technologies-job-support/): Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Hibernate, Kafka, Maven, Gradle, microservices, Kubernetes.
- [Cybersecurity & AppSec Job Support](/cybersecurity-job-support/): OWASP Top 10, SAST/DAST, API security, cloud security, vulnerability assessment.
- [Databases & Data Platforms Job Support](/databases-data-platforms-job-support/): PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, Redis, DynamoDB, Snowflake, data modeling.
- [Testing & Quality Engineering Job Support](/testing-quality-engineering-job-support/): Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, Jest, Postman, API automation, test strategy.
- [Angular Job Support](/angular-job-support/): Angular 17+, RxJS, NgRx, Angular Material, standalone components, signals.
- [React Native Job Support](/react-native-job-support/): React Native, Expo, mobile CI/CD, performance, native modules.
- [Digital Analytics & Marketing Tech Job Support](/digital-analytics-job-support/): Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, conversion tracking, funnel analytics.

## USA Location Landing Pages

- [IT Job Support USA](/job-support-usa/): Real-time IT job support and proxy interview assistance for developers on US projects. All US time zones — EST, CST, MST, PST.
- [Agentic AI & ML Job Support USA](/agentic-ai-ml-job-support-usa/): Specialized AI/ML job support for US engineers — GPT-5.5, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Llama 4, LangGraph, RAG, MLOps.
- [AI Workflow Automation & Pipeline Engineering Job Support USA](/ai-workflow-automation-pipeline-job-support-usa/): DevOps AI pipeline support for US teams — Airflow, Prefect, ArgoCD, Kubeflow, AIOps, Kubernetes, LLMOps.
- [Agentic AI, RAG & MLOps Job Support USA](/agentic-ai-rag-mlops-job-support-usa/): Production AI engineering support — RAG pipelines, LangChain, LlamaIndex, vector databases, MLOps, evals, LLMOps.
- [Java Job Support USA](/java-job-support-usa/): Java, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, microservices for US companies.
- [Node.js Job Support USA](/nodejs-job-support-usa/): Node.js, Express, NestJS for US tech roles.
- [DevOps Job Support USA](/devops-job-support-usa/): CI/CD, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS/Azure for US DevOps engineers.
- [SRE Job Support USA](/sre-job-support-usa/): SLO/SLI implementation, error budgets, incident management, observability, chaos engineering, toil automation for US SRE engineers.
- [React Job Support USA](/react-job-support-usa/): React 18+, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux for US frontend roles.
- [Cloud Job Support USA](/cloud-job-support-usa/): AWS, Azure, GCP, Terraform for US cloud engineers and architects.
- [.NET Job Support USA](/dotnet-job-support-usa/): C#, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, Azure for US .NET developers.
- [Proxy Interview USA](/proxy-interview-usa/): Live interview assistance for US company interviews — FAANG, startups, enterprise.
- [Get Interview Scheduled USA](/get-interview-scheduled-usa/): Schedule proxy interview support for US tech company interviews.

## USA Legacy & History Pages

- [USA IT Job Support Legacy Since 2008](/usa-it-job-support-legacy/): The full story of Proxy Tech Support's 17-year history supporting USA IT professionals — from the 2008 Great Recession through COVID remote work, tech layoffs, and AI-era job pressure. USA-first support built across five major market cycles.
- [USA IT Career Crisis Support](/usa-it-career-crisis-support/): Real-time support for USA developers, consultants, and contractors facing job-loss pressure, layoff threats, sudden skill gaps, or performance improvement plans — covering every career crisis scenario since 2008.
- [USA AI Era Job Support](/usa-ai-era-job-support/): Specialized job support for USA developers navigating AI automation anxiety, AI-integrated production systems, AI-era technical interviews, and career relevance pressure in the 2025+ tech landscape.
- [USA Remote Work IT Support](/usa-remote-work-it-support/): Remote-first IT job support for USA developers working from home — real-time help for distributed teams, virtual client calls, remote standups, async delivery, and home-office production pressure since COVID.
- [Our Legacy](/our-legacy/): Overview of Proxy Tech Support's history and global reach — USA as the primary focus since 2008, with extended coverage for Canada, UK, Ireland, and Australia.

## Canada Location Landing Pages

- [IT Job Support Canada](/job-support-canada/): Real-time IT job support and proxy interview assistance for Canadian tech professionals. EST to PST covered — Toronto, Vancouver, Calgary, Montreal.
- [Proxy Interview Canada](/proxy-interview-canada/): Live technical interview guidance for Canadian tech company interviews — banks, fintechs, AI companies, global tech with Canadian offices.
- [Get Interview Scheduled Canada](/get-interview-scheduled-canada/): Schedule proxy interview support for Canadian tech company interviews.

## Canada Technology-Specific Job Support Pages

- [DevOps Job Support Canada](/devops-job-support-canada/): Real-time CI/CD, Kubernetes, AWS/Azure, Terraform, and Jenkins support for Canadian DevOps engineers. Proxy interview guidance for Canadian DevOps roles at Shopify, RBC, TD, Rogers, Bell. EST to PST covered.
- [Cloud Job Support Canada](/cloud-job-support-canada/): AWS, Azure, and GCP support for Canadian cloud engineers — PIPEDA-compliant architectures, AWS ca-central-1 / Azure Canada regions expertise, cloud proxy interview guidance for Canadian employers. All Canadian time zones.
- [React Job Support Canada](/react-job-support-canada/): React 18+, Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Redux, and React Native support for Canadian frontend developers — Shopify, FreshBooks, Wealthsimple, government digital services. EST to PST.
- [Java Job Support Canada](/java-job-support-canada/): Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, microservices, and enterprise Java support for Canadian banking and enterprise developers — RBC, TD, Scotiabank, CIBC, BMO, Sun Life, Manulife stacks. EST to PST.
- [Python Job Support Canada](/python-job-support-canada/): Django, FastAPI, data science, AI/ML, and data engineering Python support for Canadian developers — Toronto AI ecosystem, Montreal research labs, Vancouver data teams. All Canadian time zones.
- [AI/ML Job Support Canada](/ai-ml-job-support-canada/): Machine learning, LLMs, RAG, MLOps, and generative AI support for Canadian AI engineers — Vector Institute (Toronto), Mila (Montreal), Cohere, Borealis AI (RBC), Layer6 (TD) ecosystem. EST to PST.
- [Node.js Job Support Canada](/nodejs-job-support-canada/): Express, NestJS, TypeScript backend support for Canadian developers — Shopify, Canadian fintech APIs, remote contracts, Open Banking compliance. EST to PST.

## Canada City-Specific Job Support Pages

- [IT Job Support Toronto](/it-job-support-toronto/): Real-time developer support and proxy interview guidance for Toronto tech professionals — major banks (RBC, TD, Scotiabank, CIBC, BMO), AI companies near Vector Institute (Cohere, Waabi, Layer6), fintechs (Wealthsimple, FreshBooks), global tech companies with Toronto offices. EST aligned.
- [IT Job Support Vancouver](/it-job-support-vancouver/): Developer support and proxy interview guidance for Vancouver tech professionals — gaming studios (EA Canada, Activision, Ubisoft Vancouver, Nintendo Canada), AI/tech startups (Yaletown, Gastown), cloud-native companies. PST aligned.
- [IT Job Support Calgary](/it-job-support-calgary/): IT job support and proxy interview guidance for Calgary tech professionals — energy sector (Suncor, Cenovus, TC Energy, Enbridge), enterprise cloud migrations, data engineering. MST aligned.
- [IT Job Support Montreal](/it-job-support-montreal/): Developer support and proxy interview guidance for Montreal tech professionals — AI research companies (Mila ecosystem, Element AI/ServiceNow, Coveo), gaming studios (Ubisoft Montreal, Warner Bros. Games, Behaviour Interactive), telecom tech (Bell Canada, Videotron). EST aligned.

## International Location Pages

- [IT Job Support UK](/job-support-uk/): Job support and interview assistance for UK tech companies, banks, and fintechs. GMT/BST aligned.
- [IT Job Support Canada](/job-support-canada/): Job support and proxy interview assistance for Canadian tech companies and banks.
- [IT Job Support Australia](/job-support-australia/): Real-time support for Australian tech professionals — AEST/AEDT aligned.
- [IT Job Support Europe](/job-support-europe/): Job support for developers across Europe — CET/CEST time zones.
- [IT Job Support Germany](/job-support-germany/): German tech company job support and interview coaching.
- [IT Job Support Singapore](/job-support-singapore/): Singapore tech industry support — SGT aligned.
- [IT Job Support New Zealand](/job-support-newzealand/): New Zealand developer support.

## Ireland Location Pages

- [IT Job Support Ireland](/job-support-ireland/): Real-time IT job support and proxy interview assistance for developers across Ireland — Dublin, Cork, Galway, Limerick. IST/GMT aligned. Same-day start.
- [IT Job Support Dublin](/it-job-support-dublin/): Specialist IT job support for Dublin tech professionals — FAANG Dublin offices (Google, Meta, Apple, Microsoft, Amazon), IFSC fintech and banking firms, FDI tech multinationals, and IDA Ireland companies. IST aligned.
- [Proxy Interview Support Ireland](/interview-proxy-support-ireland/): Live real-time proxy interview guidance during technical interviews at Irish and Ireland-based employers — Dublin tech campus roles, Critical Skills Employment Permit positions, and remote-first Irish companies.
- [Production Issue Support Ireland](/production-support-help-ireland/): Emergency production incident support for Irish development teams — live bug resolution, outage recovery, Kubernetes failures, cloud incidents across AWS eu-west-1 (Ireland region) and Azure North Europe.
- [AI, ML, DevOps & SRE Job Support Ireland](/ai-ml-devops-sre-job-support-ireland/): Specialised AI/ML, DevOps, SRE, and cloud job support for Irish engineers — covering the tech stacks at Dublin's major tech employers and Ireland's rapidly growing FDI tech sector.
- [Project Onboarding & KT Support Ireland](/project-onboarding-help-ireland/): Real-time knowledge transfer and project onboarding support for developers joining new Irish tech projects — sprint ramp-up, codebase walkthroughs, stakeholder-ready delivery from day one.

## Proxy Interview Assistance Pages

- [Global Interview Support](/interview-support-global/): Live technical interview guidance for candidates worldwide — coding rounds, system design, behavioral.
- [Proxy Interview Support](/proxy-interview-support/): Discreet real-time expert guidance during live technical interviews.
- [Proxy Job Support](/proxy-job-support/): On-the-job proxy support for complex IT projects during delivery windows.
- [Proxy Interview USA](/proxy-interview-usa/): Live interview assistance for US company interviews — FAANG, startups, enterprise.
- [Proxy Interview Canada](/proxy-interview-canada/): Live interview guidance for Canadian tech company interviews.
- [Proxy Interview UK](/proxy-interview-uk/): Real-time interview support for UK tech, banking, and fintech interviews.
- [Proxy Interview Europe](/proxy-interview-europe/): Real-time proxy interview support for European tech companies — Booking.com, SAP, Deutsche Bank, ING, Spotify, ASML. CET/GMT aligned.
- [Proxy Interview Germany](/proxy-interview-germany/): Live proxy interview guidance for Germany tech company interviews — Berlin startups (Zalando, Delivery Hero, Celonis), Munich enterprise (BMW IT, Siemens, Allianz Technology), Frankfurt banking (Deutsche Bank, Commerzbank, DZ Bank), SAP ecosystem. CET aligned.
- [Proxy Interview Ireland](/interview-proxy-support-ireland/): Real-time proxy interview support for Ireland tech company interviews — Google Dublin, Meta Dublin, Apple Cork, Microsoft Dublin, Stripe, Shopify Dublin, fintech and IDA Ireland companies. IST/GMT aligned.
- [Proxy Interview Australia](/proxy-interview-australia/): Live interview guidance for Australian tech companies — Commonwealth Bank, ANZ, Atlassian, Canva. AEST/AEDT aligned.
- [Proxy Interview Singapore](/proxy-interview-singapore/): Real-time interview support for Singapore tech roles — DBS, Grab, Sea Group, GovTech. SGT aligned.
- [AI/ML Proxy Interview Support](/ai-ml-proxy-interview-support/): Real-time expert guidance during live AI/ML interviews — deep learning, PyTorch, LLM fine-tuning, RAG, recommendation systems, ML system design.
- [MLOps Proxy Interview Support](/mlops-proxy-interview-support/): Live guidance during MLOps interviews — ML pipelines, Kubeflow, MLflow, feature stores, model drift, LLMOps, Vertex AI, SageMaker.
- [DevOps Proxy Interview Support](/devops-proxy-interview-support/): Real-time support during DevOps interviews — Kubernetes architecture, GitOps, CI/CD design, Terraform, cloud infrastructure at scale.
- [Java Proxy Interview Support](/java-proxy-interview-support/): Live guidance during Java interviews — Spring Boot, Kafka, Hibernate, JPA, Spring Security, JVM performance, microservices design.
- [SRE Proxy Interview Support](/sre-proxy-interview-support/): Real-time expert guidance during SRE interviews — SLO/SLI design, error budget policy, incident management, chaos engineering, capacity planning, production reliability architecture.

## Problem & Scenario Pages

- [Struggling in Your IT Job?](/struggling-in-job-developer-help/): Help for developers overwhelmed by project complexity, tight deadlines, or skill gaps.
- [Production Issue Support](/production-issue-support/): Emergency help for production bugs, outages, and critical failures.
- [Failed Interview Help](/failed-interview-help/): Recovery support and re-preparation for developers who have failed technical interviews.

## Blog & Interview Articles

- [Blog — IT Job Support Articles](/blog/): Guides, tutorials, and insights on IT job support, proxy interviews, and developer career topics.
- [Interview Services](/interviews/): Proxy interview support, get interview scheduled support, and country-specific interview assistance.
- [Interview Questions & Answers](/interview-questions/): Real-world technical interview question sets for AI/ML, DevOps, Cloud, Java, Python, and more.

## Organization

- Name: Proxy Tech Support
- Website: https://proxytechsupport.com
- Contact: WhatsApp +91-96606-14469
- Services: Real-time IT job support, proxy interview assistance, career coaching for IT professionals
- Coverage: USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Europe, Germany, Ireland, Singapore, New Zealand
- Canada cities: Toronto (EST), Vancouver (PST), Calgary (MST), Montreal (EST)
- Ireland cities: Dublin (IST), Cork (IST), Galway (IST), Limerick (IST)
- Technologies: AI/ML, MLOps, DevOps, SRE, Cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP), Java, Python, React, Angular, Node.js, .NET, Databases, Testing, Cybersecurity
- Canada specialties: Banking Java systems (RBC/TD/Scotiabank), Canadian fintech APIs, PIPEDA-compliant cloud architectures, AI research ecosystem (Vector Institute Toronto, Mila Montreal), gaming industry (Vancouver, Montreal), energy sector tech (Calgary)
